report.name: Basic Process Improvement Attempt - Initial Impact Assessment

chartData.text:
Office Filing System
Basic organization attempt (ROI: 15%)

highlightsData.title: Limited Impact Measurement Understanding
highlightsData.description:
Informal Approach: Basic attempts at process improvement without systematic impact measurement or clear success criteria. Improvements lack quantifiable business value assessment and stakeholder alignment.

Methodology Training Needed: Fundamental impact mapping training required to understand value quantification, stakeholder analysis, prioritization frameworks, and systematic measurement approaches.

highlightsData.title: Unclear Success Criteria and Measurement
highlightsData.description:
No Baseline Establishment: Improvement initiatives lacking proper baseline measurement, target setting, and progress tracking. Current efforts show minimal ROI (5-15%) due to informal approach without systematic methodology.

Measurement Framework Required: Comprehensive training needed on impact measurement, ROI calculation, stakeholder engagement, and systematic improvement planning to achieve meaningful business value.

highlightsData.title: Limited Stakeholder Engagement
highlightsData.description:
Minimal Team Involvement: Improvement efforts limited to 1-2 individuals without broader stakeholder engagement or organizational support. Initiatives lack strategic alignment and systematic change management approach.

Organizational Support Needed: Comprehensive change management and stakeholder engagement training required to expand improvement scope and achieve sustainable organizational impact.

actionItems.title: Provide Impact Mapping Methodology Training
actionItems.description: Deliver fundamental training on impact mapping principles, value quantification, stakeholder analysis, and systematic improvement planning to build organizational capability.

attachments.name: impact_mapping_training_curriculum.jpg
attachments.description: Impact mapping methodology training curriculum with value quantification and stakeholder analysis techniques

actionItems.title: Establish Basic Measurement Framework
actionItems.description: Create simple measurement framework with baseline establishment, target setting, and progress tracking protocols for systematic improvement approach development.

actionItems.title: Develop Stakeholder Engagement Plan
actionItems.description: Create systematic stakeholder identification, engagement, and communication plan to expand improvement initiative scope and organizational support for enhanced impact.

actionItems.title: Restart Improvement Initiative with Systematic Approach
actionItems.description: Restart improvement efforts using proper impact mapping methodology with stakeholder engagement, value quantification, and systematic measurement for sustainable results.
